api/client/javascript.purpose: Published npm package (@openmeter/sdk) orchestrating code generation (openapi-typescript + orval), dual ESM/CJS build (duel), and four named sub-package exports: default admin client, /portal, /react, /zod. All src/ files are either generated or thin wrappers — the dist/ directory is the published artifact.

patterns.name: Generated-first src/client/schemas.ts
patterns.description: schemas.ts is regenerated by scripts/generate.ts using openapi-typescript on api/openapi.cloud.yaml. Never hand-edit it — changes are lost on next `pnpm run generate:client`.
patterns.example: pnpm run generate:client  # runs tsx scripts/generate.ts && biome format --write ./src/client/schemas.ts

patterns.name: Orval for Zod schemas
patterns.description: src/zod/index.ts is produced by orval using orval.config.ts (input: ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, output: zod client, PascalCase naming). Never edit this file directly.
patterns.example: pnpm run generate:zod  # runs orval && tsx scripts/add-as-const.ts && biome lint+format

patterns.name: Four named sub-package exports
patterns.description: package.json exports map '.', './portal', './react', './zod' to separate dist entry points. New resource classes go in src/client/ and must be registered as public fields on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts.

patterns.name: Dual ESM/CJS build via duel
patterns.description: Build script is `duel`, producing dist/*.js (ESM) and dist/cjs/*.cjs (CJS). tsconfig.json uses module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=nodenext.

patterns.name: openapi-typescript patch at install time
patterns.description: pnpm.patchedDependencies in package.json applies patches/openapi-typescript.patch to the installed package's dist/ artifacts. Must be regenerated after upgrading openapi-typescript.

patterns.name: Biome as sole linter/formatter
patterns.description: biome.json configures Biome (not eslint/prettier) with useConst, useAsConstAssertion, noUselessElse. Run `pnpm run format` or `biome lint --write`.

patterns.name: Type overrides via openapiTS transform hook
patterns.description: date-time → Date overrides are applied in scripts/generate.ts via the openapiTS transform hook during AST traversal, not via post-hoc regex.
patterns.example: // In scripts/generate.ts: transform hook intercepts SchemaObject nodes during openapiTS run

key_file_guides.role: Drives orval Zod schema generation for src/zod/index.ts. Input is ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, PascalCase naming, coercion enabled for body/param/query.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Changing the input path breaks generation if the relative URL from the package root does not resolve; orval must be run from the package root.

key_file_guides.role: Defines four sub-package exports, pnpm patch for openapi-typescript, generate/build/test scripts, and peer dependency on react >=18.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding a new export path requires updating both 'exports' and ensuring duel emits the matching file; missing either breaks consumers. patchedDependencies hash becomes stale after upgrading openapi-typescript.

key_file_guides.role: Strict TypeScript config with module=NodeNext. Excludes test files and scripts/ from compilation. Includes src/react/**/*.tsx for JSX.
key_file_guides.watch_for: scripts/**/*.ts and *.config.ts are excluded — type errors in build scripts are silent unless run separately with tsc.

key_file_guides.role: Single consolidated patch applied to openapi-typescript dist/ via pnpm patchedDependencies. Contains all local bug fixes not yet upstream.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Stale patch base hash after upgrading openapi-typescript causes pnpm install to fail. Must regenerate patch after each upgrade.

key_file_guides.role: Root package entry — re-exports everything from src/client/index.js. Portal, react, and zod are separate sub-package exports, not re-exported here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add logic or additional exports here; only the admin client is re-exported from the root.

key_file_guides.role: Post-generation script that runs openapi-typescript on openapi.cloud.yaml to produce src/client/schemas.ts, applying type overrides via transform hook.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must be run from the package root (scripts/ directory relative URL resolution for openapi.cloud.yaml depends on it).

key_file_guides.role: Temporary orval workaround that transforms generated src/zod/index.ts. Clearly labelled as throwaway — do not add permanent logic here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: This script is not imported by application code; it is a build-time tool only.

key_file_guides.role: Sole linter/formatter config with strict style rules (useConst, useAsConstAssertion, noUselessElse). useSortedKeys is disabled for package.json via override.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add eslint or prettier config — Biome is the single source of truth for formatting and linting.

anti_patterns: Hand-editing src/client/schemas.ts or src/zod/index.ts — both are generated and overwritten by `pnpm run generate`
Adding admin-level endpoints to src/portal/ — the portal client is intentionally restricted to portal-token-scoped operations only
Adding new resource classes to src/client/ without registering them as public fields on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts
Running scripts/generate.ts from a directory other than the package root — the relative URL to openapi.cloud.yaml will fail to resolve
Creating multiple patch files instead of the single consolidated patches/openapi-typescript.patch — pnpm patchedDependencies expects one file per package

decisions.decision: openapi-typescript is patched at the dist/ level rather than forked
decisions.rationale: Allows tracking upstream releases while carrying local fixes; the patch is reapplied automatically by pnpm at install time and must be regenerated after each upstream upgrade.

decisions.decision: Four distinct sub-package exports instead of a single entry point
decisions.rationale: Admin client, portal client, React integration, and Zod schemas have different runtime dependencies and bundle sizes; splitting them lets consumers tree-shake and avoid pulling in react or zod unless needed.

decisions.decision: Type overrides applied via openapiTS transform hook in scripts/generate.ts, not post-hoc regex
decisions.rationale: The transform hook runs during AST traversal so the override is type-safe and stable across openapi-typescript upgrades; regex post-processing is fragile and order-dependent.

code_examples.scenario: Full SDK generation + build pipeline after OpenAPI spec changes
code_examples.code:
# From api/client/javascript/
pnpm --frozen-lockfile install
pnpm run generate        # runs generate:client (openapi-typescript) + generate:zod (orval)
pnpm run build           # duel ESM+CJS build -> dist/
pnpm run lint            # tsc --noEmit && biome lint .
pnpm run test            # vitest --run
